activities_projects.title: Map Marking of Physiographic Divisions
activities_projects.objective: Understand the spatial distribution of India’s major physical divisions
steps: Draw an outline map of India
Mark the Himalayas, Northern Plains, Peninsular Plateau, Indian Desert, Coastal Plains, and Islands
Label each division correctly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the location of major physiographic divisions
activities_projects.evaluation: Accuracy and completeness of labeling (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Comparison of Himalayan Ranges
steps: Draw a table with three columns
Write the names Himadri, Himachal, and Shiwaliks
List their height, features, and examples
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand differences among Himalayan ranges

activities_projects.title: River Systems Study
activities_projects.objective: Understand how rivers form the Northern Plains
steps: List the three major river systems forming the Northern Plains
Identify two tributaries for each river
Explain their role in forming fertile plains
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand river systems and alluvial plains

activities_projects.title: Relief Features Diagram
activities_projects.objective: Understand the relief divisions of Northern Plains
steps: Draw a diagram showing Bhabar, Terai, Bhangar, and Khadar
Label each region
Write one feature of each
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand relief variations in plains

activities_projects.title: Plateau Regions Identification
activities_projects.objective: Study the divisions of the Peninsular Plateau
steps: Locate Central Highlands and Deccan Plateau on a map
Write their boundaries
List two rivers flowing through each region
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the structure of the Peninsular Plateau

activities_projects.title: Western and Eastern Ghats Study
activities_projects.objective: Compare Western Ghats and Eastern Ghats
steps: Write differences in height, continuity, and location
List one major peak from each
Explain their climatic importance
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the significance of Ghats

activities_projects.title: Desert Landform Study
steps: Write three characteristics of the Indian Desert
Explain the formation of sand dunes
Name the main river flowing in this region

activities_projects.title: Coastal Plains Project
activities_projects.objective: Study the divisions of coastal plains
steps: Draw two columns for western and eastern coasts
List their divisions
Mention important rivers forming deltas

activities_projects.title: Island Group Study
steps: Write differences between Lakshadweep and Andaman & Nicobar Islands
Explain coral island formation
Mention one important feature of each island group

activities_projects.title: Physical Diversity Essay
activities_projects.objective: Understand the importance of India’s physical diversity
steps: Write a short essay explaining the importance of mountains, plains, plateaus, and coasts
Include examples from the chapter
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Students understand the significance of diverse landforms
